reason: Check any RVV runtime claim is backed by focused ssh rvv evidence.
Check no compute semantics or RVV branches were moved into tcrv.exec.
Check selected source identity, selected config, runtime length, and descriptor quarantine are preserved.
Check target artifact export/runtime ABI contracts are consumed before artifact success.
Check typed source op and generated EmitC interface authority remain the source of artifact identity.
Check focused tests and evidence match the changed runtime/artifact behavior.
Check this round consumes the newly exported artifact source identity instead of re-exporting only.
Check runtime ABI invocation remains production-owned and script-consumed.
